name: epydemicarchive-client

metadata.name: epydemicarchive-client
metadata.license: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 or later

documentation:
# epydemicarchive-client: Client for epydemic archives

```{image} https://badge.fury.io/py/epydemicarchive.svg
:target: https://badge.fury.io/py/epydemicarchive
```

## Overview

`epydemicarchive-client` is the client-side of the API for accessing
`epydemicarchive` archives of networks. It is intended to make the
programmatic use of the archive simpler. Even simpler is to use the
archive-friendly network generators of `epydemic`.

## Author and license

classes.name: epydemicarchive.api.v1.client.client.Archive

methods.name: epydemicarchive.api.v1.client.client.Archive.base_uri
documentation:
Return the base URI used to access this archive. This is
a combination of the archive URI and the namespace for the
endpoints of the current version of the API.

:returns: the base URI

methods.name: epydemicarchive.api.v1.client.client.Archive.endpoint
documentation:
Return the URI associatedx with the given method.

```
param meth

the method

param arg

the argument (defaults to none)

returns

a URI
```

methods.name: epydemicarchive.api.v1.client.client.Archive.tags
documentation:
Return all the tags applied to networks in the archive.

:returns: a list of tags

methods.name: epydemicarchive.api.v1.client.client.Archive.networks
documentation:
Return all the network UUIDs for networks in the archive.

:returns: a list of UUIDs

methods.name: epydemicarchive.api.v1.client.client.Archive.info
documentation:
Return a dict of information about the given network.

:param uuid the network's UUID
:returns: a dict of information

methods.name: epydemicarchive.api.v1.client.client.Archive.raw
documentation:
Retreve and load the network with the given UUID.

```
param uuid

the network's UUID

returns

the networkx representation of the network
```

methods.name: epydemicarchive.api.v1.client.client.Archive.submit
documentation:
Submit a network to the archive.

```
param g

the network

param title

(optional) title for the network

param desc

(optional) descrriptionfor the network

param tags

(optional) tags to be applied to the network

returns

the UUID of the submitted network
```

methods.name: epydemicarchive.api.v1.client.client.Archive.search
documentation:
Search the archive for a number of networks matching the given
criteria. The size of pool from which to draw can be set to ensure
enough randomness; networks previously used can be excluded from any
selection to prevent re-use.

Metadata constraints take the form of a list of triples where
each triple is of the form:

(\<variable>, \<operator>, \<value>)

where \<operator> is one of ==, !=, \<, \<=, >, >=.

```
param tags

(optional) the tags that must be present (defaults to none)

param metadata

(optional) metadata constraints (defaults to none)

param exclude

(optional) list of network UUIDs to exclude

param n

(optional) number of networks to retrieve (defaults to all)

param pool

(optional) minimum pool of networks to draw from
```

class_variables.name: epydemicarchive.api.v1.client.client.Archive.CHUNKSIZE
documentation: : Chunk size for streaming networks from the archive.

class_variables.name: epydemicarchive.api.v1.client.client.Archive.FILETYPE
documentation: : Default file type for submitted networks.

class_variables.name: epydemicarchive.api.v1.client.client.Archive.API
documentation: : The file part of the API base URI.

A client-side representation of an epydemic archive.

If the base URI is not provided it is loaded from the SERVER_URI
environment variable. If the API key is not provided it is loaded
from the API_KEY environment variable. This allows programs that
populate an archive to be configured from their runtime
environment. Exceptions are raised if these values aren't
available.

```
param uri

(optional) the base URI of the archive

param api_key

(optional) the API key to authenticate against the archive
```
